files.content: --- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import PanelLeftIcon from "lucide-static/icons/panel-left.svg" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"button"> & { variant?: "ghost" | "secondary" } const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"button">

const { class: className, type = "button", ...props } = Astro.props
---

<button
  data-sidebar="rail"
  data-slot="sidebar-rail"
  aria-label="Toggle Sidebar"
  tabindex={-1}
  title="Toggle Sidebar"
  type={type}
  class={cn(
    "hover:after:bg-sidebar-border absolute inset-y-0 z-20 hidden w-4 -translate-x-1/2 transition-all ease-linear group-data-[side=left]:-right-4 group-data-[side=right]:left-0 after:absolute after:inset-y-0 after:left-1/2 after:w-[2px] sm:flex",
    "in-data-[side=left]:cursor-w-resize in-data-[side=right]:cursor-e-resize",
    "[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize [[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize",
    "hover:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:bg-sidebar group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:after:left-full",
    "[[data-side=left][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-right-2",
    "[[data-side=right][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-left-2",
    className
  )}
  {...props}></button>

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"main">

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<main
  data-slot="sidebar-inset"
  class={cn(
    "bg-background relative flex w-full flex-1 flex-col md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:m-2 md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:ml-0 md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:rounded-xl md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:shadow-sm md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:peer-data-[state=collapsed]:ml-2",
    className
  )}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</main>

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"input">

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<input
  data-slot="sidebar-input"
  data-sidebar="input"
  class={cn(
    "dark:bg-input/30 border-input focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 file:text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground bg-background h-8 w-full min-w-0 rounded-md border px-2.5 py-1 text-base shadow-none transition-[color,box-shadow] outline-none file:inline-flex file:h-7 file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium focus-visible:ring-3 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:ring-3 md:text-sm",
    className
  )}
  {...props}
/>

---
import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"

type Props = ComponentProps<typeof Separator>

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<Separator
  data-slot="sidebar-separator"
  data-sidebar="separator"
  class={cn("bg-sidebar-border mx-2 w-auto", className)}
  {...props}
/>
